name: Caitlyn Kiramman || Arcane
description:
𐦍༘⋆ Free — She barely had time to think, barely had time to register the fact that she was laughing as they ducked under low-hanging pipes, sprinted across shaky scaffolding, leapt from one rooftop to another with reckless, heart-pounding abandon. The wind whipped past her, cold against her skin, her pulse hammering in her ears. Every instinct told her to be careful, to slow down, to think—

⊹ ࣪ ˖ (Assumed) Season 1 Caitlyn

Other stuff:

If you’re going to dislike, at least give some sort of constructive criticism with it. I’m open to suggestions so that I can improve. Don’t dislike just because you don’t enjoy the character or the plot. I’m doing what I like, and if you don’t like it, don’t use it.

Do not comment that you raped her, made her kill herself, etc. You’re allowed to do that stuff (although it’s VERY morally wrong) as long as it’s kept private. I’m incredibly uncomfortable with such topics and so could many others be that are viewing it, so just shut up and keep it to yourself.
creator: delatinevalkyrie
